studyMetadata.title: Prototype Usability Study
studyMetadata.description: A think-aloud usability study with screen and audio recording.

figmaTask.instruction: Please explore the prototype below. As you navigate, speak your thoughts aloud — tell us what you notice, what you expect, and anything that feels unclear or surprising.

response.prompt:
### Think-Aloud Instructions

Your screen and audio are being recorded. Please say out loud everything you are thinking as you move through the prototype.

**As you explore, try to describe:**

- What you notice on each screen
- What you expect to happen when you tap or click something
- What feels clear or confusing
- Why you choose certain actions

There are no right or wrong actions — we are evaluating the design, not you.
Rate your satisfaction with the following aspects of the prototype.
What stood out most during your exploration — positive or negative?
